raw_responses.title: DOTS: Learning Optimal Reasoning Trajectories (ICLR 2025)

raw_responses.title: The Evolution of Thought: LLM Overthinking via Reasoning Dynamics
raw_responses.snippet: Latent semantic trajectories: broad exploration → stable neighborhood with repetitive oscillations → convergence regime. 94.3-96.5% of post-convergence points lie inside 95% confidence basin.
